title: Meta Microdigital
tagline: Web and marketing for an IT & digital marketing company.
description: Meta Microdigital is an IT and digital marketing firm. Verience partnered on their web presence and ongoing marketing, helping them present services clearly and reach clients in a competitive digital services market.
features: Corporate website for IT and digital marketing services
Brand-aligned design for a technology-forward agency
Campaign and content support for client acquisition
Fast iteration cycles for launches and updates
contentPreview: Meta Microdigital needed a web presence that reflects their dual focus on IT solutions and digital marketing. We designed and built a site that communicates capability without clutter, making it easy for prospects to understand what they offer.
Alongside development, we support their digital marketing with content and social strategy aligned to how they want to show up in the market.
The partnership stays agile: quick turnarounds on updates, thoughtful design decisions, and marketing assets that match a modern tech-services brand.
